steps.title: Substitute the radius
steps.content:
The volume of a sphere is $V=\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3$. Substitute $r=\frac{7}{3}$.
$$V=\frac{4}{3}\pi(\frac{7}{3})^3$$

steps.title: Cube the radius
steps.content:
Cube the numerator and denominator of the radius.
$$(\frac{7}{3})^3=\frac{7^3}{3^3}$$
$$\frac{7^3}{3^3}=\frac{343}{27}$$

steps.title: Simplify the volume
steps.content:
Multiply the remaining factors.
$$V=\frac{4}{3}\pi\cdot\frac{343}{27}$$
$$V=\frac{1{,}372\pi}{81}$$ The answer is D.
